table.name: assets
table.column: Unique identifier for each asset
Status of the asset approval process
Timestamp when the asset was approved
Description of the asset
Location of storage (e.g., GCS Path, On-prem Parquet location)
Name of the asset
Business function that owns the asset
Owner of the asset
Asset onboarded timestamp to LDC/Fabric
Asset onboarded by to LDC/Fabric
Status in pipeline (e.g., Live, In progress)
Type of asset (e.g., MRDS, PRI, MDA, GDA, CDA)
Value stream/data domain where data is created
Output format (e.g., Delta, Parquet, BQ Table, Hive Table)
Boolean: is the asset a data product
Team responsible for delivering the asset
Boolean: is the HLSD approved
Boolean: is this an intermediary asset
LDC/Fabric lifecycle status (e.g., REGISTERED, DRAFT)
Physical location of the asset
Platform where the asset is hosted
CIN ID of the hosting platform
Day of refresh (e.g., Monday, Everyday, 1st Day)
Frequency (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly)
Boolean: is this a strategic data asset
Last update timestamp
Last update made by
Value stream/data domain where data is created
